definition:
συν-οράω, see: συνεῖδον.
 συν-εῖδον  irreg. aorist of συνοράω (see: εἶδον), 
 [in LXX: 1Ma.4:21 א, 2Ma.2:24 2Mac 4:4 2Mac 4:41 R 2Ma.5:17 2Mac 7:4 2Mac 7:20 2Mac 8:8, 3Ma.2:8 A * ;] 
  1. to see together or at the same time (Arist., Xen.). 
   2. to see in one view, hence, of mental vision, to comprehend, understand (LXX, Polyb., Plut., al.) : Act.12:12 14:6 (on the related σύνοιδα, see see word).†
 (AS)
